profile.name: CHEA Rotha
profile.title: Data Scientist & Machine Learning Engineer
profile.bio: Transforming data into strategic assets through machine learning and advanced analytics. I build intelligent systems that not only predict outcomes but shape smarter decisions. Passionate about innovation, scalability, and real-world impact.
profile.aboutMe:
I am an innovative Data Scientist and Machine Learning Engineer with a strong academic foundation in Applied Mathematics and Statistics. My expertise lies in designing and delivering end-to-end predictive systems, transforming complex data into scalable, high-performance solutions—from advanced feature engineering to production-ready model deployment.

I have a proven ability to architect sophisticated machine learning frameworks and leverage advanced data visualization techniques to address high-complexity technical challenges. 
My work focuses not only on building accurate models, but also on creating systems that are robust, efficient, and aligned with real-world business needs.

Driven by curiosity and continuous innovation, I am passionate about pushing the boundaries of AI and data science to unlock deeper insights, optimize performance, and create meaningful impact at scale.

skills.name: Numpy
skills.description: Advanced numerical computing library for Python used for multidimensional arrays, matrix operations, mathematical functions, data processing, linear algebra, statistical analysis, and high-performance scientific computation for AI, data science, and engineering applications.

skills.name: Keras
skills.description: High-level deep learning framework built on TensorFlow for designing, training, and deploying neural networks, including CNN, RNN, LSTM, and AI models for computer vision, predictive analytics, and intelligent automation systems.

skills.name: MongoDB
skills.description: Document-oriented NoSQL database designed for scalable, high-performance applications with flexible schema architecture, real-time data handling, cloud integration, API-driven systems, and modern full-stack development environments.

skills.name: Django
skills.description: High-level Python web framework used for building secure, scalable, and data-driven web applications with integrated ORM, authentication, REST API support, admin dashboard management, and rapid backend development capabilities.

skills.name: Anaconda
skills.description: Comprehensive Python and data science distribution used for package management, virtual environment creation, machine learning workflows, Jupyter Notebook integration, scientific computing, and AI development with optimized library management.

skills.name: PyTorch
skills.description: Open-source deep learning framework used for building, training, and deploying neural networks, computer vision models, NLP systems, and advanced AI applications with dynamic computation graphs and GPU acceleration support.

skills.name: Git
skills.description: Distributed version control system used for source code management, collaboration, branch management, change tracking, CI/CD workflows, and efficient software development across web, AI, and enterprise applications.

skills.name: Power BI
skills.description: Business analytics and data visualization platform used for interactive dashboards, KPI monitoring, real-time reporting, ETL workflows, data modeling, and enterprise decision-making through advanced visual analytics and cloud-based business intelligence solutions.

projects.title: Laptop Price Prediction
projects.description: Built an end-to-end pricing model for laptop market data: data cleaning, exploratory analysis, feature engineering, and model comparison. Trained and evaluated Linear Regression, Random Forest, and SVR, with SVR delivering the best predictive accuracy.

projects.title: Hotel Reservation System Database
projects.description: Designed and implemented a relational database for hotel operations covering room booking, client management, staff scheduling, and payment confirmation workflows. Produced ERD and normalized schema with key constraints for robust data integrity.

projects.title: Forecasting Tourism in Cambodia
projects.description: Performed time-series forecasting on Cambodia tourism data using Python and statistical models. Preprocessed data, evaluated models with MSE, and identified seasonality and post-COVID recovery trends to support planning and policy insights.

projects.title: Crop Yield Prediction & Recommendation
projects.description: Developed machine learning models for crop yield prediction using agricultural, soil, and weather features. Compared Random Forest and XGBoost, evaluated with RÂ²/MAE/RMSE, and built a recommendation component for suitable crop selection.

projects.title: SWG Dispatch EMS
projects.description:
SWG Dispatch EMS is an intelligent Energy Management System module designed to monitor, control, and optimize power dispatch operations in real time.
It enables seamless communication between switchgear, BESS, SCADA, and grid systems for reliable energy coordination.
Built for modern energy infrastructure, it enhances operational efficiency, stability, and smart dispatch management.

experience.title: Data Scientist
experience.description:
Developed a hybrid inflation forecasting model (XGBoost + LSTM + SARIMAX) to improve national projection accuracy.
- Built and maintained macroeconomic data pipelines including cleaning, feature engineering, and stationarity testing.
- Analyzed global (oil, gold) and domestic indicators affecting inflation.
- Created interactive dashboards and reports for policy-making and economic planning.
- Collaborated with economists and policymakers to translate data into actionable insights.

experience.title: Battery Energy Storage System Engineer
experience.description: Analyzed BESS performance data, built dashboards, and developed data-driven models to optimize energy efficiency and system reliability. Collaborated with engineering teams to monitor systems, troubleshoot issues, and support deployment.

experience.title: Instructor - Data Science
experience.description:
- Taught EDA, statistics, machine learning, forecasting, and data visualization with practical Python and Power BI projects.
- Guided students in dashboard building, analysis, and insight generation from real datasets.
- Designed hands-on exercises and mini-projects to strengthen analytical and coding skills.
- Mentored students on data storytelling for technical and non-technical audiences.
- Supported students in applying ML and statistical methods to real-world problems.

education.field: Industrial Engineering / Data & Intelligent Systems Engineering
education.description: Pursuing an Engineering Degree at the Institute of Technology of Cambodia (ITC) with focus on industrial systems, data analysis, intelligent technologies, automation, and engineering problem-solving. Experienced in software development, AI integration, energy systems analysis, database management, and advanced data visualization for technical and industrial applications. Participated in academic and technical projects involving machine learning, dashboard systems, and smart energy management solutions.

Completed English language studies at Aii Language Center with focus on communication, academic writing, grammar, presentation skills, and professional English usage. Developed strong reading, speaking, listening, and analytical communication abilities for academic, technical, and professional environments. Participated in language practice activities, presentations, and collaborative learning programs to improve fluency and confidence in English communication.

Completed foundational training in cybersecurity principles, network security, ethical hacking concepts, cyber risk awareness, digital threat analysis, password security, data protection, and secure system practices. Developed practical understanding of cyber defense techniques, security monitoring, and basic incident response methodologies.

blog.title: CDC reviewing eight projects, $490M in capital
blog.content:
A Ã¢â‚¬Å“One Window ServiceÃ¢â‚¬Â meeting of the Cambodian Investment Board to examine and discuss investment project registration applications was held on the morning of April 21. The meeting was chaired by Chea Vuthy, CIB secretary-general, with participation from representatives of several government institutions, including subnational administrations.

According to the CDC, the eight projects have a combined capital of $490 million and are expected to create around 2,000 jobs. Among them, four projects fall under the industrial sector, including: a factory for manufacturing household electrical appliances; a factory producing inflatable mattresses, toys and swimming equipment; a yarn production and dyeing factory; and an expansion project adding garment washing operations to an existing garment and embroidery factory.
blog.excerpt: Eight investment proposals Ã¢â‚¬â€ seven new projects and one an expansion Ã¢â‚¬â€ worth nearly $500 million in total investment capital are under review by the Cambodian Investment Board (CIB) of the Council for the Development of Cambodia (CDC), prior to official approval.
